'''F'Dann IX''' was a celestial body<ref name="TTaBS">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> located in the [[F'Dann system/Legends|F'Dann system]], a part of the [[Dufilvian sector/Legends|Dufilvian sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="Date">The [[Battle of F'Dann IX|battle]] near F'Dann IX took place at least six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the setting of ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'', which corresponds to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. The confrontation must have therefore occurred at some point by [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].</ref> the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Dominant]]'' of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] engaged the [[Crimson Nova|Crimson Nova Gang]] in [[Battle of F'Dann IX|battle]] near F'Dann IX, a confrontation in which the ''Dominant'' suffered damage heavy enough to warrant repairs in [[Drydock/Legends|drydock]].<ref name="TTaBS" />

==Behind the scenes==
F'Dann IX was mentioned in ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'', a [[1996]] sourcebook published for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TTaBS" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the F'Dann [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thereby F'Dann IX, in grid square R-15.<ref name="TEA" />
